Description: Health check endpoint. Returns the current status of the Nokia Schedular API service.
Output Format: JSON object with status and service name

Description: List all sites with gantt chart data. Supports filtering by region, market, site_id, vendor, area, user_id, status with pagination. Optionally apply vendor capacity and pace constraints. Status filter matches both overall_status and exclude_reason.
Input Parameters: Query Params: region (string, optional), market (string, optional), site_id (string, optional), vendor (string, optional), area (string, optional), user_id (string, optional), limit (int, optional), offset (int, optional), consider_vendor_capacity (bool, optional, default=false), pace_constraint_flag (bool, optional, default=false), status (string, optional — ON TRACK, IN PROGRESS, CRITICAL, Blocked, Excluded - Crew Shortage, Excluded - Pace Constraint)
Output Format: JSON object with count, sites array, and pagination info
Output Example (JSON): {"count": 1, "sites": [{"site_id": "SITE001", "project_id": "PRJ-101", "project_name": "Tower Build", "market": "NYC", "region": "Northeast", "construction_start_4225": "2025-03-01", "gc_assignment": "Vendor A", "milestones": [{"key": "1310", "name": "Site Acquisition", "sort_order": 1, "path": "col_name", "expected_days": 30, "dependency_type": "finish_to_start", "task_owner": "PM", "phase_type": "Acquisition", "preceding_milestones": null, "following_milestones": ["1320"], "planned_start": "2025-03-01", "planned_finish": "2025-03-31", "actual_finish": "2025-03-28", "actual_value": "Complete", "days_since": 5, "days_remaining": 0, "delay_days": 0, "status": "COMPLETED", "status_color": "green"}], "overall_status": "ON TRACK", "overall_progress": 45.5, "critical_path_delay": 0, "note": "Ready for schedule", "exclude_reason": null, "delay_comments": null, "delay_code": null}], "pagination": {"limit": 10, "offset": 0, "total_count": 1}}

Description: Dashboard summary for a user. Returns aggregated site status counts and on-track percentage based on user's saved filter preferences.
Output Format: JSON object with dashboard summary statistics

Description: Get all distinct region values from the database. Used to populate region filter dropdowns.
Get all distinct market values from the database. Used to populate market filter dropdowns.
Get all distinct area values (m_area column) from the database. Used to populate area filter dropdowns.
Get all distinct site ID values from the database. Used to populate site filter dropdowns.
Output Format: JSON array of site ID strings

Description: Get all distinct vendor values from the database. Used to populate vendor filter dropdowns.
List all prerequisite/milestone definitions ordered by sort_order. Each prerequisite is enriched with its dependency graph (preceding and following milestones).
Get a single prerequisite/milestone definition by its ID. Returns the prerequisite enriched with dependency information.
Get a Mermaid-format flowchart string representing the prerequisite dependency graph. Returns plain text.
List all constraint thresholds ordered by type then sort_order. Used for milestone and overall site status color-coding rules based on count ranges.
List only milestone-level constraint thresholds. Filters thresholds where constraint_type is 'milestone'.
List only overall site-level constraint thresholds. Filters thresholds where constraint_type is 'overall'.
Get a single constraint threshold by its ID.
Create a new constraint threshold. Validates count ranges, prevents overlapping ranges and duplicate entries within the same constraint_type.
Input Parameters: Request Body: constraint_type (string, 'milestone' or 'overall'), name (string, required), status_label (string, required), color (string, required), min_pct (int, default=0), max_pct (int, optional), sort_order (int, default=0)

Description: Update an existing constraint threshold. Supports partial updates, validates count ranges and prevents overlapping ranges.
Input Parameters: Path Params: constraint_id (int, required). Request Body: name (string, optional), status_label (string, optional), color (string, optional), min_pct (int, optional), max_pct (int, optional), sort_order (int, optional)

Description: Delete a constraint threshold by its ID.
Get all distinct por_plan_type values from the staging table. Used to populate plan type filter options.
Output Format: JSON array of plan type strings

Description: Get all distinct por_regional_dev_initiatives values from the staging table. Used to populate regional dev initiatives filter options.
Output Format: JSON array of regional dev initiative strings

Description: Save or update gate check filter selections for a user. Upserts the UserFilter row with plan_type_include and regional_dev_initiatives.
Input Parameters: Request Body: user_id (string, required), plan_type_include (list[string], optional), regional_dev_initiatives (string, optional)

Description: Get saved gate check selections for a specific user. Returns 404 if no gate checks are saved.
AI-powered chat interface. Maintains conversation history per user_id and thread_id. Returns recommended API endpoints and parameters for the frontend to call.
Input Parameters: Query Params: user_id (string, required), thread_id (string, required). Request Body: message (string, default='Give the current filters')
Input Example (JSON): {"message": "Show me all critical sites in Northeast region"}
Output Format: JSON object with assistant response (recommended endpoints and params)
Output Example (JSON): {"message": "Based on your request, I recommend calling the gantt-charts endpoint with region=Northeast filter.", "actions": [{"endpoint": "/api/v1/schedular/gantt-charts", "params": {"region": "Northeast"}}]}

Description: Create a new chat thread for a user. Persists an initial record so it appears in history. Returns the generated thread_id.
Output Format: JSON object with thread_id and user_id

Description: Resume a simulation after HITL (human-in-the-loop). When a simulation returns hitl_required the frontend collects the user's answer and calls this endpoint.
Input Parameters: Request Body: thread_id (string, required), clarification (string, required)

Description: Get all chat history grouped by user_id and thread_id (all users). Returns full message content for every thread.
Get all thread summaries for a specific user (lightweight with message previews not full messages).
Output Example (JSON): [{"thread_id": "abc123", "message_count": 4, "first_user_message": "Show me critical sites...", "first_assistant_message": "Here are the critical sites...", "last_message_at": "2025-03-01T10:05:00"}]

Description: Get full chat messages for a specific user + thread.
Input Parameters: Path Params: user_id (string, required), thread_id (string, required)

Description: Delete all chat history for a specific user (all threads).
Delete all messages for a specific user + thread.
Input Parameters: Path Params: user_id (string, required), thread_id (string, required)

Description: Get saved filter preferences for a specific user. Returns empty defaults (id=0) if no filters are saved for the user — never returns 404.
Output Example (JSON): {"id": 1, "user_id": "user123", "region": "Northeast", "market": "NYC", "vendor": "Vendor A", "site_id": null, "area": null, "plan_type_include": "[\"New Build\"]", "regional_dev_initiatives": "2026 Build Plan"}

Description: Clear all saved filter preferences for a specific user.
Mark a prerequisite as skipped for the current user. Prevents duplicate skip entries.
List all skipped prerequisites for a specific user.
Un-skip a single prerequisite for a specific user. Restores the prerequisite to active state.
Input Parameters: Path Params: user_id (string, required), milestone_key (string, required)

Description: Un-skip all prerequisites for a specific user. Restores all prerequisites to active state.
Set or update the expected_days SLA override for a specific milestone for a user. Upserts the record.
Input Parameters: Path Params: user_id (string, required). Request Body: milestone_key (string, required), expected_days (int, required, >= 0)

Description: List all expected_days SLA overrides for a specific user.

Gantt chart using history-based SLA. Computes expected_days from historical actual dates within the specified date range, saves them, then returns gantt chart. Status filter matches both overall_status and exclude_reason. Optionally apply vendor capacity and pace constraints.
Input Parameters: Query Params: date_from (string, YYYY-MM-DD, required), date_to (string, YYYY-MM-DD, required), region (string, optional), market (string, optional), site_id (string, optional), vendor (string, optional), area (string, optional), user_id (string, optional), limit (int, optional), offset (int, optional), consider_vendor_capacity (bool, optional, default=false), pace_constraint_flag (bool, optional, default=false), status (string, optional — ON TRACK, IN PROGRESS, CRITICAL, Blocked, Excluded - Crew Shortage, Excluded - Pace Constraint)
Output Format: JSON object with sla_type, date range, sla_last_updated, count, sites array, and pagination

Description: Clear all history_expected_days values from milestone_definitions table. Reverts all milestones to use default expected_days.

Export gantt chart data as a downloadable CSV file using default/user-override SLA. Supports all gantt chart filters. Status filter matches both overall_status and exclude_reason. CSV includes columns: Site ID, Project ID, Project Name, Market, Area, Region, Vendor, All Prerequisites Complete Date, Forecasted CX Start, Overall Status, On Track %, Total Milestones, On Track, In Progress, Delayed, Note, Exclude Reason, Delay Comments, Delay Code, plus per-milestone columns (Status, Planned Start, Planned Finish, Actual Finish, Expected Days, Delay Days, Task Owner, Phase Type).
Input Parameters: Query Params: region (string, optional), market (string, optional), site_id (string, optional), vendor (string, optional), area (string, optional), user_id (string, optional), consider_vendor_capacity (bool, optional, default=false), pace_constraint_flag (bool, optional, default=false), status (string, optional — ON TRACK, IN PROGRESS, CRITICAL, Blocked, Excluded - Crew Shortage, Excluded - Pace Constraint)
Output Example (JSON): CSV file with site-level columns (Site ID, Project ID, Project Name, Market, Area, Region, Vendor, All Prerequisites Complete Date, Forecasted CX Start, Overall Status, On Track %, Total Milestones, On Track, In Progress, Delayed, Note, Exclude Reason, Delay Comments, Delay Code) plus per-milestone columns (Status, Planned Start, Planned Finish, Actual Finish, Expected Days, Delay Days, Task Owner, Phase Type)

Description: Export gantt chart data as a downloadable CSV file using SLA history-based expected_days. Computes expected_days from historical actual dates within [date_from, date_to]. Supports all gantt chart filters. Status filter matches both overall_status and exclude_reason. Same CSV column format as gantt-csv.
Input Parameters: Query Params: date_from (string, YYYY-MM-DD, required), date_to (string, YYYY-MM-DD, required), region (string, optional), market (string, optional), site_id (string, optional), vendor (string, optional), area (string, optional), user_id (string, optional), consider_vendor_capacity (bool, optional, default=false), pace_constraint_flag (bool, optional, default=false), status (string, optional — ON TRACK, IN PROGRESS, CRITICAL, Blocked, Excluded - Crew Shortage, Excluded - Pace Constraint)
Output Example (JSON): CSV file with same columns as gantt-csv: site-level columns (Site ID, Project ID, Project Name, Market, Area, Region, Vendor, All Prerequisites Complete Date, Forecasted CX Start, Overall Status, On Track %, Total Milestones, On Track, In Progress, Delayed, Note, Exclude Reason, Delay Comments, Delay Code) plus per-milestone columns

Description: Admin-only: Create a new prerequisite/milestone definition. Auto-syncs prereq_tails and handles dependency rewiring for insertion into the chain.
Input Parameters: Request Body: key (string, required), name (string, required), expected_days (int, default=0), start_gap_days (int, default=1), task_owner (string, optional), phase_type (string, optional), preceding_milestone_keys (list[string], optional), following_milestone_keys (list[string], optional), insert_after_key (string, optional), columns (list[MilestoneColumnCreate], default=[])

Description: Admin-only: Update an existing prerequisite/milestone definition. Supports partial updates and auto-syncs prereq_tails.
Input Parameters: Path Params: prerequisite_id (int, required). Request Body: name (string, optional), expected_days (int, optional), start_gap_days (int, optional), task_owner (string, optional), phase_type (string, optional)

Description: Admin-only: Globally skip a prerequisite. Sets is_skipped=True on the milestone definition affecting all users.
Admin-only: List all globally skipped prerequisites.
Admin-only: Un-skip a single prerequisite globally. Restores the prerequisite to active state for all users.
Admin-only: Un-skip all prerequisites globally. Restores all prerequisites to active state for all users.
Admin-only: List all column names from the staging table. Used to populate column mapping dropdowns when creating prerequisites.
Output Format: JSON array of column name strings

Description: List all GC (vendor) capacity entries from the predefined public.gc_capacity_market_trial table. Read-only — shows how many sites each vendor can work on in parallel per market.
Return the region to area to market hierarchy from the staging table. Used by the frontend to populate geo dropdowns for pace constraints.
Output Format: JSON object with nested region/area/market hierarchy

Description: List all pace constraints for a user. Each constraint defines a date range, market/area/region scope, and max sites allowed. If start_date/end_date are null, next ISO week (Monday-Sunday) is filled in.

Create a new pace constraint for a user. Only one geo level (region, area, or market) per constraint. Validates geo hierarchy conflicts against existing constraints. start_date and end_date are optional (both or neither).
Input Parameters: Request Body: user_id (string, required), start_date (string, YYYY-MM-DD, optional), end_date (string, YYYY-MM-DD, optional), market (string, optional), area (string, optional), region (string, optional), max_sites (int, default=5)

Description: Update an existing pace constraint. Must belong to the specified user. Validates single geo level and geo hierarchy conflicts. Supports partial updates.
Input Parameters: Path Params: entry_id (int, required). Query Params: user_id (string, required). Request Body: start_date (string, optional), end_date (string, optional), market (string, optional), area (string, optional), region (string, optional), max_sites (int, optional)

Description: Delete a pace constraint. Must belong to the specified user.
Input Parameters: Path Params: entry_id (int, required). Query Params: user_id (string, required)

Description: Dashboard summary using default/user override SLA with aggregated site status counts. Supports all gantt chart filters including vendor capacity and pace constraints.
Input Parameters: Query Params: region (string, optional), market (string, optional), site_id (string, optional), vendor (string, optional), area (string, optional), user_id (string, optional), consider_vendor_capacity (bool, optional, default=false), pace_constraint_flag (bool, optional, default=false), status (string, optional — ON TRACK, IN PROGRESS, CRITICAL, Blocked, Excluded - Crew Shortage, Excluded - Pace Constraint)

Description: Dashboard summary using SLA history-based (median) overrides within a date range. Returns per-milestone median completion days and dashboard status counts. Supports all gantt chart filters.
Input Parameters: Query Params: date_from (string, YYYY-MM-DD, required), date_to (string, YYYY-MM-DD, required), region (string, optional), market (string, optional), site_id (string, optional), vendor (string, optional), area (string, optional), user_id (string, optional), consider_vendor_capacity (bool, optional, default=false), pace_constraint_flag (bool, optional, default=false), status (string, optional)
Output Format: JSON object with SLA summary and dashboard stats

Description: Week-wise status counts using default/user override SLA. Groups sites by ISO week/year based on forecasted_cx_start_date and returns status counts per week. Supports all gantt-chart filters including vendor capacity and pace constraints.
Input Parameters: Query Params: region (string, optional), market (string, optional), site_id (string, optional), vendor (string, optional), area (string, optional), user_id (string, optional), consider_vendor_capacity (bool, optional, default=false), pace_constraint_flag (bool, optional, default=false), status (string, optional — ON TRACK, IN PROGRESS, CRITICAL, Blocked, Excluded - Crew Shortage, Excluded - Pace Constraint)
Output Format: JSON object with sla_type and weeks array
Output Example (JSON): {"sla_type": "user_override", "weeks": [{"week": 10, "year": 2026, "week_start": "2026-03-02", "week_end": "2026-03-08", "total": 5, "status_counts": {"ON TRACK": 2, "IN PROGRESS": 1, "CRITICAL": 1, "Blocked": 0, "Excluded - Crew Shortage": 0, "Excluded - Pace Constraint": 1}}]}

Description: Week-wise status counts using SLA history-based overrides. Computes expected_days from historical actual dates within the specified date range then groups sites by ISO week/year. Supports all gantt-chart filters.
Input Parameters: Query Params: date_from (string, YYYY-MM-DD, required), date_to (string, YYYY-MM-DD, required), region (string, optional), market (string, optional), site_id (string, optional), vendor (string, optional), area (string, optional), user_id (string, optional), consider_vendor_capacity (bool, optional, default=false), pace_constraint_flag (bool, optional, default=false), status (string, optional — ON TRACK, IN PROGRESS, CRITICAL, Blocked, Excluded - Crew Shortage, Excluded - Pace Constraint)
Output Format: JSON object with sla_type, date range, and weeks array
Output Example (JSON): {"sla_type": "history", "date_from": "2025-01-01", "date_to": "2025-06-30", "weeks": [{"week": 10, "year": 2026, "week_start": "2026-03-02", "week_end": "2026-03-08", "total": 5, "status_counts": {"ON TRACK": 2, "IN PROGRESS": 1, "CRITICAL": 1, "Blocked": 0, "Excluded - Crew Shortage": 0, "Excluded - Pace Constraint": 1}}]}

Description: Calendar view — returns gantt chart sites whose forecasted_cx_start_date falls within the given date range. Uses default/user-override SLA. Supports all gantt chart filters.
Input Parameters: Query Params: start_date (date, YYYY-MM-DD, required), end_date (date, YYYY-MM-DD, required), region (string, optional), market (string, optional), site_id (string, optional), vendor (string, optional), area (string, optional), user_id (string, optional), consider_vendor_capacity (bool, optional, default=false), pace_constraint_flag (bool, optional, default=false), status (string, optional)
Output Format: JSON object with sla_type, date range, count, and sites array

Description: Calendar view using history-based SLA. Computes expected_days from historical actual dates within [sla_date_from, sla_date_to], then returns only sites whose forecasted_cx_start_date falls within [start_date, end_date].
Input Parameters: Query Params: start_date (date, YYYY-MM-DD, required), end_date (date, YYYY-MM-DD, required), sla_date_from (date, YYYY-MM-DD, required), sla_date_to (date, YYYY-MM-DD, required), region (string, optional), market (string, optional), site_id (string, optional), vendor (string, optional), area (string, optional), user_id (string, optional), consider_vendor_capacity (bool, optional, default=false), pace_constraint_flag (bool, optional, default=false), status (string, optional)
Output Format: JSON object with sla_type, date ranges, sla_last_updated, count, and sites array

Description: Pending milestone distribution using default/user-override SLA. Returns a list showing how many sites have N pending milestones (milestones without actual_finish). Blocked sites are excluded from counts and returned separately. Supports optional forecasted CX start date range filtering.
Input Parameters: Query Params: region (string, optional), market (string, optional), site_id (string, optional), vendor (string, optional), area (string, optional), user_id (string, optional), consider_vendor_capacity (bool, optional, default=false), pace_constraint_flag (bool, optional, default=false), filter_date_from (string, YYYY-MM-DD, optional — only include sites with forecasted CX start >= this date), filter_date_to (string, YYYY-MM-DD, optional — only include sites with forecasted CX start <= this date)
Output Format: JSON object with sla_type, total_sites, blocked_sites, and pending_milestones array

Description: Pending milestone distribution using SLA history (median completion days). Blocked sites are excluded from counts and returned separately. Supports optional forecasted CX start date range filtering.
Input Parameters: Query Params: date_from (string, YYYY-MM-DD, required), date_to (string, YYYY-MM-DD, required), region (string, optional), market (string, optional), site_id (string, optional), vendor (string, optional), area (string, optional), user_id (string, optional), consider_vendor_capacity (bool, optional, default=false), pace_constraint_flag (bool, optional, default=false), filter_date_from (string, YYYY-MM-DD, optional — only include sites with forecasted CX start >= this date), filter_date_to (string, YYYY-MM-DD, optional — only include sites with forecasted CX start <= this date)
Output Format: JSON object with sla_type, date range, total_sites, blocked_sites, and pending_milestones array

Description: Per-milestone pending site count using default/user-override SLA. Returns a list showing how many sites are pending for each milestone name. Blocked sites are excluded from counts and returned separately. Supports optional forecasted CX start date range filtering.
Input Parameters: Query Params: region (string, optional), market (string, optional), site_id (string, optional), vendor (string, optional), area (string, optional), user_id (string, optional), consider_vendor_capacity (bool, optional, default=false), pace_constraint_flag (bool, optional, default=false), filter_date_from (string, YYYY-MM-DD, optional — only include sites with forecasted CX start >= this date), filter_date_to (string, YYYY-MM-DD, optional — only include sites with forecasted CX start <= this date)
Output Format: JSON object with sla_type, total_sites, blocked_sites, and milestones array

Description: Per-milestone pending site count using SLA history (median completion days). Blocked sites are excluded from counts and returned separately. Supports optional forecasted CX start date range filtering.
Input Parameters: Query Params: date_from (string, YYYY-MM-DD, required), date_to (string, YYYY-MM-DD, required), region (string, optional), market (string, optional), site_id (string, optional), vendor (string, optional), area (string, optional), user_id (string, optional), consider_vendor_capacity (bool, optional, default=false), pace_constraint_flag (bool, optional, default=false), filter_date_from (string, YYYY-MM-DD, optional — only include sites with forecasted CX start >= this date), filter_date_to (string, YYYY-MM-DD, optional — only include sites with forecasted CX start <= this date)
Output Format: JSON object with sla_type, date range, total_sites, blocked_sites, and milestones array

Description: Drilldown into analytics charts — returns full gantt site data for the clicked bar using default/user-override SLA. Use drilldown_type=pending_count to get sites with exactly N pending milestones, or drilldown_type=milestone_key to get sites where a specific milestone is pending. Blocked sites are excluded and returned separately. Supports optional forecasted CX start date range filtering.
Input Parameters: Query Params: drilldown_type (string, required — 'pending_count' or 'milestone_key'), pending_count (int, required if drilldown_type=pending_count), milestone_key (string, required if drilldown_type=milestone_key), region (string, optional), market (string, optional), site_id (string, optional), vendor (string, optional), area (string, optional), user_id (string, optional), consider_vendor_capacity (bool, optional, default=false), pace_constraint_flag (bool, optional, default=false), filter_date_from (string, YYYY-MM-DD, optional — only include sites with forecasted CX start >= this date), filter_date_to (string, YYYY-MM-DD, optional — only include sites with forecasted CX start <= this date)
Output Format: JSON object with drilldown_type, pending_count/milestone_key, count, blocked_sites, and sites array

Description: Drilldown into SLA history analytics charts — returns full gantt site data for the clicked bar using SLA history (median). Use drilldown_type=pending_count or drilldown_type=milestone_key. Blocked sites are excluded and returned separately. Supports optional forecasted CX start date range filtering.
Input Parameters: Query Params: date_from (string, YYYY-MM-DD, required), date_to (string, YYYY-MM-DD, required), drilldown_type (string, required — 'pending_count' or 'milestone_key'), pending_count (int, required if drilldown_type=pending_count), milestone_key (string, required if drilldown_type=milestone_key), region (string, optional), market (string, optional), site_id (string, optional), vendor (string, optional), area (string, optional), user_id (string, optional), consider_vendor_capacity (bool, optional, default=false), pace_constraint_flag (bool, optional, default=false), filter_date_from (string, YYYY-MM-DD, optional — only include sites with forecasted CX start >= this date), filter_date_to (string, YYYY-MM-DD, optional — only include sites with forecasted CX start <= this date)
Output Format: JSON object with drilldown_type, date range, pending_count/milestone_key, count, blocked_sites, and sites array
